parameters.name: week_start
parameters.description: Start date of the week (YYYY-MM-DD, typically Monday)

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start of date range in ISO 8601 format

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End of date range in ISO 8601 format

parameters.name: connection_id
parameters.description: Filter by specific calendar connection ID

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: OAuth state parameter for CSRF verification

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Authorization code from the OAuth provider

parameters.name: error
parameters.description: Error code if OAuth flow failed

schema.example: The user denied the authorization request

parameters.name: account_label
parameters.description: Display label for the connected account

info.title: MBTI Self-CDM API

provider_user_id.description: User ID from the OAuth provider

logout_all_devices.description: Whether to log out from all devices

question_set_version.description: Version of the question set to use

answer_value.description: Answer value on a 1-5 Likert scale

items.description: List of answers to MBTI finder questions

local_date.description: Local date for the reorder operation (YYYY-MM-DD)

items.description: List of tasks with their new sort orders

note.example: Remember to buy milk and eggs

context.description: Context of the check (e.g. morning, evening)

completed_summary.example: Finished the landing page and wrote tests

carry_forward_note.description: Notes on tasks to carry forward

prompt_answers.description: Answers to mindfulness prompts keyed by prompt ID
